top_events.event_id: stockholm-based validio, whose agentic platform autonomously detects and resolves data quality issues, raised a $30m series a, bringing its total raised to $47m (chris metinko/axios)
top_events.title: Stockholm-based Validio, whose agentic platform autonomously detects and resolves data quality issues, raised a $30M Series A, bringing its total raised to $47M (Chris Metinko/Axios)
top_events.title_zh: 总部位于斯德哥尔摩的 Validio 的代理平台能够自动检测和解决数据质量问题，筹集了 3000 万美元的 A 轮融资，使其融资总额达到 4700 万美元（Chris Metinko/Axios）
top_events.title_bilingual: 总部位于斯德哥尔摩的 Validio 的代理平台能够自动检测和解决数据质量问题，筹集了 3000 万美元的 A 轮融资，使其融资总额达到 4700 万美元（Chris Metinko/Axios） / Stockholm-based Validio, whose agentic platform autonomously detects and resolves data quality issues, raised a $30M Series A, bringing its total raised to $47M (Chris Metinko/Axios)

top_events.event_id: anthropic launches an early-warning system for potential ai-driven destruction of white-collar jobs, says it shows "limited evidence" of ai-led job loss so far (courtenay brown/axios)
top_events.title: Anthropic launches an early-warning system for potential AI-driven destruction of white-collar jobs, says it shows "limited evidence" of AI-led job loss so far (Courtenay Brown/Axios)
